title: Wordcount/character count on forms
excerpt:
We need an ability to add custom wordcounts or character counts to forms on the short and long answer options. 
Currently they are set to a default but it would be good to be able to set it ourselves.

posts.author: Yamwk (Yam)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need an ability to add custom wordcounts or character counts to forms on the short and long answer options.

Currently they are set to a default but it would be good to be able to set it ourselves.
